_comment: v2.0 declared-tier example: an A2A 'message/send' JSON-RPC request carrying tenant_id on Message.metadata. The sandbox accepts the field, validates it, echoes it back on emitted messages, but does NOT scope resources by it — all tenant_id values map to the implicit 'default' tenant in v2.0. See spec.md §5 for v2.0 behavior.

parts.text: Run the regression suite against branch feature/multi-tenant-shape.

_extension_activation._comment: The client is expected to send this HTTP header alongside the JSON-RPC body. Reproduced here for documentation only; not part of the JSON-RPC payload.

_expected_response_summary._comment: Documentation of the expected response in v2.0. Not part of the request payload.
_expected_response_summary.isolation: none — the dispatched mission is visible to any other client on the same sandbox, regardless of their tenant_id, because v2.0 does not enforce tenancy. This is the declared-tier contract.
